allow: PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'assets\\pbv-source-pdfs' | Out-Null; $names = @\('main-application-en','main-application-es','citizenship-declaration-en','citizenship-declaration-es','obligations-of-family-en','obligations-of-family-es','hud-9886a-en','hud-9886a-es','hach-release-en','hach-release-es','hud-92006-en','hud-92006-es','child-support-affidavit-en','child-support-affidavit-es','no-child-support-affidavit-en','no-child-support-affidavit-es','briefing-cert-en','briefing-cert-es','debts-owed-phas-en','debts-owed-phas-es'\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $src = "docs\\templates\\$n.pdf"; $dst = "assets\\pbv-source-pdfs\\$n.pdf"; if \(Test-Path $src\) { Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dst -Force; "OK   $n" } else { "MISS $n" } })
